_comment: Reference only. Phase 0 probes the active launcher and freezes real literals in a private policy directory. Current Codex preference: THINK=gpt-5.6-sol, VERIFY=codex-auto-review, BUILD=gpt-5.6-luna (or gpt-5.6-terra when Luna is unavailable). No mid-run substitution.
think: REPLACE: strongest available agentic coding/reasoning model
verify: REPLACE: independent rigorous review model, never weaker than bulk
